How is Siena different from Gorgias?

SIENA AIGORGIAS AI SUITE
Remembers every customer
Each interaction builds memory, deepening relationships and surfacing insights
Customers repeat themselves, no business insights
Tailor tone and style
Multiple agent personas per channel with rich tone and style
Single agent persona with limited tone presets
AI-Native or Add-on?
AI-Native platform built from the ground up
Add-on to legacy ticketing system
Knowledge & Sources
Domain-level crawl, Google Docs & Sheets, unlimited sources
Manual sub-page entry only, capped at 10 URLs
Pre-launch testing
Inline playground with step-by-step reasoning for confident deployments
Basic test view with minimal reasoning trace
Configurable response time
Set custom delays per channel for natural conversation flow
Instant responses only
Flexible AI disclosure
Full control over AI disclosure
AI disclosure required, no flexibility
QA coverage
Evaluate 100% of your conversations against criteria you write in plain language
Lacks an integrated QA automation layer
Review management
Fully automates review moderation and responses
No moderation and responses, no automation

Hey! Need help with an order I placed yesterday—I forgot to apply my discount code.

No worries! I’ve got your order pulled up. I can apply the code “WELCOME15” and refund the difference—ready to go?

Yes please! Appreciate it.

Done. Also noticed you’ve bought from our skincare line twice—our new serum just dropped and it’s a perfect match. Want me to add it to your cart with 10% off?

Omg yes! That sounds amazing.

FAQ

Can Siena work across multiple channels?
Absolutely. Siena works across email, SMS, chat, WhatsApp, social media (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok), voice, and more—all from a unified AI that maintains context across channels. Your customers get the same experience whether they reach out on Instagram or email.
Does Siena handle pre-purchase and post-purchase interactions?
Yes. Siena's Shopping Agent handles product discovery, recommendations, and conversions, while the Customer Service Agent manages post-purchase support like returns, exchanges, and tracking.
Why does Siena include implementation support instead of self-service setup?
Because high-quality automation requires expertise most brands don't have yet. Our implementation team manages setup from day one: connecting systems, structuring your knowledge base, and configuring automations that mirror your business. We apply proven frameworks from hundreds of implementations to get your workflows performing at production quality before launch. Other platforms rely on self-service because their automation is limited to basic deflection. Siena powers complex workflows like returns, exchanges, and subscription management. You reach reliable automation faster than trial and error.
What's the difference between Siena's pricing and Gorgias's pricing model?
Siena uses transparent per-conversation pricing. You know exactly what you're paying for—no hidden formulas, no debates over what counts as "resolved." Gorgias uses outcome-based pricing, which sounds appealing but creates disputes over resolution definitions and unpredictable costs. With Siena, cost = conversations × rate. Simple.
Does Siena require me to use a specific helpdesk?
No. Siena sits on top of your existing helpdesk—whether that's Zendesk, Kustomer, Gorgias, Dixa, or others. You can switch helpdesks anytime without losing Siena. Gorgias AI only works with the Gorgias helpdesk, locking you into their ecosystem. If you ever want to change your helpdesk, you lose your AI investment with Gorgias.
What if I want to switch from Gorgias to another helpdesk in the future?
With Siena, switching is seamless. Siena integrates with major helpdesks like Zendesk, Kustomer, Dixa, Gladly, and Intercom, so you can move platforms while keeping all your AI automations, workflows, and training intact. Gorgias AI is dependent on the Gorgias helpdesk. If you leave Gorgias, you start over.
Why do brands choose Siena over Gorgias AI?
Brands choose Siena because it's built AI-native from the ground up, not bolted onto an existing helpdesk. Siena delivers 80% automation rates that remain stable and improve over time. Siena works on top of your existing helpdesk (Zendesk, Kustomer, Gorgias, etc.), so you're never locked in. If you want to switch helpdesks, Siena moves with you
Is Siena suitable for enterprise brands?
Yes. Siena is trusted by enterprise brands and is SOC 2, GDPR, CPRA, and HIPAA compliant. Our reasoning architecture provides the visibility, control, and explainability enterprise teams need. We offer dedicated onboarding, Slack support, and custom integrations for complex tech stacks.
